title: Cornucopia Reborn
description: This is the sequel to Cornucopia.
body:
![Cornucopia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdc9f355b8de0a0c5775463a71add8319ba7c5b1.png)

This mod is a sequel to the [Cornucopia](https://modrinth.com/mod/cornucopiabypizza573) and also adds compatibility for Eternal Food in Artifacts
.  

How to obtain the Horn of Plenty:  

First-time eating reward: Eating for the first time will reward a Goat Horn.  

Goat Horn conversion: By right-clicking a Goat Horn filled with food, you can convert it into a Horn of Plenty.  

# Mechanics:  

- Prioritize eating food that fully restores hunger.  
- When health is below the set health threshold (default 10 points), prioritize eating golden apples (enchanted golden apples have higher priority).  
- Slightly reduce eating time.  
- Eating has a chance to reward three types of apples.

![Artifacts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7adcc7f7e4c848c067b0043c7346679d662553c5.png)
